titleStmt.title: SII 10.258: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 258. (A.R. No. 271 of 1905.) ON THE FOUR FACES OF A PILLAR IN THE DARK ROOM OF THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURANTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1134. (Āngīrasa)

summary.p: States that a certain Rāmachandra Narēndra, grandson of Paṭṭapu Rāmadēvarāja made a gift of several villages to god Tripurāntaka of Tripurāntakam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigatapaṁ
camahāśabda mahā
maṁḍalēśvara Oṟayū
ri puravarādhīśvara sa
tyahariścaṁdra vibha
vāmarēṁdra mona
muṭṭugaṁḍa calama
¨rttigaṁḍa dāḍisa
ma¨rttha raṇaraṁga
pā¨rttha ripukaṁja
kuṁjara śaraṇāga
tavajrapaṁjara
śau¨ryyanārāya
ṇa nītipārāya
ṇa paranārīdūra
vibudhajanādhāra
pagavaṟabhīma
kāminījanakāma

Aśvabeṁḍuva bi
rudaceṁbaḍuva na
ḍavaṟāditya vitara
ṇavikramāditya
lavairi vīramurāri śauca
gāṁgēya kaliyugarā
dhēya vivēkavidyādhara
gaṁbhīrasāgara turagadā
nasama¨rttha Anavaratapa
rahitā¨rttha pratyakṣadha
¨rmmanaṁdana nujana
jasaharicaṁdana biru
da halasamara
mukha cauṣa
ṣṭividyāvicakṣaṇa vi
dvajjanarakṣaṇa Abhi
navabharata satukī
¨rttibharita vīralakṣmīva
llabha bhayalōbhadu
¨rlabha caturamriduma
dhuravacanaracanaca
turānana vipularipu
śrīpaṣaḍānana vāranā
rīmanōraṁjana biruda
madabhaṁjana Ādirājā
nvayācāracāritra
nripavanajamitra

kaviga vādivā
gmi budhabadhiraAṁdha
kabhaṭanaṭaśiṣṭanikhila
yācakajanaciṁtāma
ṇi parākramacūḍā
maṇi śrītripurāṁttaka
śrīmanmahādēvaradivya
śrīpādapadmārādhaka pa
rabalasādhaka nāmādi
samastapraśastisahi
taṁbuna śrīmatu paṭṭa
pu rāmadēvarājunaku
suputrulaina gōṁka na
rēṁdrunaku nudbhaviṁccina
mannarāmacaṁdranarēṁdru
ḍu svastiśrīśakava¨rṣaṁbu
lu 1134 nēṁṭi Āṁgi
rasa saṁvatsara kā
¨rttikaśuddha 15 Ā
divāramuna sōma
grahaṇanimittamu
na śrītripurāṁttaka
śrīmahādēvaraku
Aṁgabhōgaraṁgabhō
gamulaku nityani
vēdyamulaku ni
ccina Ūḍu kro
kaṁppaṇamu

mapalli
vīṟukela
kaṁppaṇamulōna
kaṁkaṇamu ceṟu
vu bammukūru
sōmapalli [U]kkame
palli yinimaḍla
pāḍu nuḍuvali
kaṁppaṇamulōna
rāmasamudramu
nāgasānipallini
berasi
Ūṟlu Ācaṁdra
tārakamu niccitimi
tripurāṁttakamu
catussīmamugāni
ccina polimera tū
¨rpuna guṁḍēṟu da
kṣiṇamunaṁ baḍu
maṭaṁ buliyēṟu
Uttaramuna maḍivā
ṁgu mēragā nicce . sva
dattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō harēti vasuṁdha
rā ṣaṣṭi va¨rṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 10.258 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
